set XD_HW_BUS=A
set XD_IP_ADDR=192.168.0.2
set XD_DEBUG=1

// NCU2
NCU2
AUTOSTART=YES
TITLE=NCU2
PROGRAM=<NCU2_CODE>

// AL02 LIS
Slot 1
set XD_PMM_LED_RUN=1
AUTOSTART=YES
TITLE=AL02
PROGRAM=<PCS_CODE>

// DiagLis
Slot 13
set XD_STDIO=CONSOLE
AUTOSTART=NO
PRIORITY=NORMAL
PROGRAM=<DIAGLIS_CODE>
TITLE=AL02_DiagLis Tool
